notes: v0.16.87 — Mini-boss spawn belt-and-suspenders init. Follow-up to v0.16.86. Even if some Godot 4 quirk skips MiniBoss._ready, the spawn flow now explicitly forces every Combatant field after MiniBoss.new(): alive=true, visible=true, z_index=8 (was defaulting to 0 → boss drawn UNDER the arena bg, hence empty-arena symptom), radius=46, max_hp=720, hp=max_hp, position=(0,0), color = _kind_color(), and an explicit _hive_build_drones() backstop for the queen archetype + set_physics_process(true). apply_difficulty still re-scales HP at the end. Diag strip + console log stay one more release; both drop once mini-bosses are confirmed drawing. Windows only.
